message:
✨ Polish mission sidebar: solid backgrounds, wider layout, fix overflow (#1612)

- Solid backgrounds for message bubbles: assistant uses bg-card with
  border, user uses bg-secondary, system uses bg-yellow-950
- Widen sidebar from 500px to 580px for better content readability
- Remove max-w-[85%] constraint on assistant messages so text uses
  full width instead of being clipped
- Add min-w-0 to all input wrappers and inputs to prevent overflow
- Keep user messages at max-w-[80%] for chat bubble appearance

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
